title: carduus rigens
intro: Carduus rigens, also known as the prickly thistle or Scotch thistle, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its large, prickly leaves and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carduus rigens include relief from menstrual cramps, arthritis, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
